The **Steinberg Wellness Center**, formally known as the Wellness, Recreation and Athletic Center (WRAC), is a 2,500-seat multi-purpose [arena](/wiki/Arena "Arena") in [Brooklyn, New York](/wiki/Brooklyn,_New_York "Brooklyn, New York"). It was built in 2006 and is home to the [Long Island University](/wiki/Long_Island_University "Long Island University") men's and women's basketball, women's volleyball, women's fencing, women's swimming and diving, and women's water polo teams.[[2]](#cite_note-2) LIU previously played their home games at the [Schwartz Athletic Center](/wiki/Schwartz_Athletic_Center "Schwartz Athletic Center"). Following President David Steinberg's retirement in Spring 2013, the WRAC was renamed the Steinberg Wellness Center to honor his 27-year tenure as President.
